title: AGR Access Profile
description: Defines what an agent can access — MCP servers, skills, data classifications, action policies, and budget limits. Used with `agr register --profile <file>` or via the SDK.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support

mcps_allowed.description: MCP servers this agent may use. Empty array means none allowed.

mcps_denied.description: Explicitly denied MCP servers. Takes precedence over mcps_allowed.

skills_allowed.description: Skills (Copilot extensions) this agent may invoke.

data_classification_max.description: Maximum data sensitivity level this agent can access.

actions.description: Action patterns mapped to decisions. Supports wildcards (e.g. 'deploy.*': 'deny').

BudgetLimit.description: Resource consumption limits for the agent.

max_requests_per_hour.description: Maximum number of requests per hour. Hard-enforced.

max_tokens_per_hour.description: Maximum total tokens (input + output) per hour. Soft limit.

max_cost_per_day_usd.description: Maximum daily cost in USD. Soft limit.
